product.name: Search product boosts
product.description: List of search queries for which a product gets higher rank in search results

product.name: Related products
product.description: List of related products

product.name: Related products settings
product.description: Determines how related products are displayed along with algorithmic product recommendations

product.name: Complementary products
product.description: List of complementary products

product.name: Color
product.description: Defines the primary color or pattern, such as blue or striped

product.name: Recommended age group
product.description: Identifies the suitable age range for a product, typically toys and games; e.g. babies, teens

product.name: Toy/Game material
product.description: Identifies the main material used in a toy or game, such as plastic or wood

product.name: Riding toy propulsion type
product.description: Identifies how a riding toy is propelled, such as electric or pedal

product.name: express delivery
product.description: Turn on for the products that have express delivery

product.name: Portability
product.description: Specifies the ease of moving or carrying a product, typically for breast pumps; e.g. portable, compact size

product.name: Infant age group
product.description: Classifies products suitable for specific infant age ranges, e.g. newborn, 0-6 months

product.name: Developmental features
product.description: Highlights the developmental benefits of a product, such as language development or emotional & social growth

product.name: Wheel type
product.description: Specifies the kind of wheel for cycling products, such as inflatable or solid

product.name: Features
product.description: Describes additional qualities or characteristics of a product, such as lightweight or foldable

product.name: Google: Custom Product
product.description: Use to indicate whether or not the unique product identifiers (UPIs) GTIN, MPN, and brand are available for your product.

product.name: Outdoor equipment features
product.description: Identifies unique traits of outdoor gear, such as weather resistant or portable

product.name: Board game mechanics
product.description: Describes the gameplay structure of a board game, such as strategy or cooperative

product.name: Gameplay skills
product.description: Identifies the skills enhanced by a game, like strategic thinking or memory

product.name: Board game features
product.description: Highlights unique aspects of a board game, e.g. quick set-up, expansion available

product.name: Reading toy type
product.description: Specifies the type of educational reading toy, e.g. spelling game, reading tablet

variant.name: Google: Custom Label 4
variant.description: Label that you assign to a product to help organize bidding and reporting in Shopping campaigns.

variant.name: Google: Custom Label 3
variant.description: Label that you assign to a product to help organize bidding and reporting in Shopping campaigns.

variant.name: Google: Custom Label 2
variant.description: Label that you assign to a product to help organize bidding and reporting in Shopping campaigns.

variant.name: Google: Custom Label 1
variant.description: Label that you assign to a product to help organize bidding and reporting in Shopping campaigns.

variant.name: Google: Custom Label 0
variant.description: Label that you assign to a product to help organize bidding and reporting in Shopping campaigns.

variant.name: Google: Size System
variant.description: The country of the size system used by your product.

variant.name: Google: Gender
variant.description: The gender for which your product is intended.

variant.name: Google: Condition
variant.description: The condition of your product at time of sale.

variant.name: Google: Age Group
variant.description: The demographic for which your product is intended.

shop.name: Google: Show Store Widget App Embed Block
shop.description: Indicates if the store widget app embed block should be shown.
